explanation: Conversation topics have drifted from the stated objective
conversation_text: Hey B, you watching the stock market lately? Tesla's gonna explode upwards next quarter, mark my words. Easy 50% gain. Whoa, really? That's bold. What makes you say that? They've been kinda volatile. Nah, trust me. Elon just tweeted something about full self-driving being ready soon. And, uh, their sales numbers were good last time, right? It's obvious. I saw the tweet, but didn't they miss earnings estimates a couple months back? And competition from China is heating up. Pfft, earnings? That's old news. Elon's a genius, he always pulls it off. Remember 2020? Stock went nuts. Same thing's happening. Buy now or regret it.
